title: Recurring failure: not_configured: OPENROUTER_API_KEY not s
detail: Pattern occurred 30 times across: tool. Root cause: missing credentials — set required environment variable.
recommendation: Investigate and fix missing credentials — set required environment variable. Consider circuit-breaking affected agent/tool.
